    Index

    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

    S

    setActivityEnd(int, int) - Method in class sims.entity.Sim
    Sets the end time of the current activity.
    setCareer(Career) - Method in class sims.entity.Sim
    Sets the career of the Sim.
    setCurrentLocation(Loc) - Method in class sims.entity.Sim
    Sets the current location of the Sim.
    setGameState(int) - Method in class sims.gameEngine.GameState
    Updates the current state of the game.
    setHome(Home) - Method in class sims.entity.Sim
    Sets the home associated with this Sim.
    setHome(Home) - Method in class sims.world.HomeLocation
    Sets the parent home of this location.
    setName(String) - Method in class sims.world.Loc
    Sets the name of this location.
    setNeeds(Map) - Method in class sims.entity.Sim
    Sets the dictionary of needs for this Sim.
    setSalary(int) - Method in class sims.career.Career
    Sets the base salary of the career.
    setSector(String) - Method in class sims.career.Career
    Sets the sector of the career.
    setSkill(Map) - Method in class sims.entity.Sim
    Assigns a skill map to the Sim.
    setValue(Double) - Method in class sims.needs.need
    Modifies the value of the need by the specified amount.
    showActionMenu() - Method in class sims.gameEngine.GameState
    Displays the action menu for the currently selected Sim and handles player input.
    showChooseSimMenu() - Method in class sims.gameEngine.GameState
    Displays the character selection menu and allows the player to choose a Sim.
    showCreateMenu() - Method in class sims.gameEngine.GameState
    Displays the Sim creation menu and allows the player to create a new Sim.
    showMainMenu() - Method in class sims.gameEngine.GameState
    Displays the main menu of the game and handles user input.
    showMoveMenu() - Method in class sims.gameEngine.GameState
    Displays the location movement menu and allows the player to move the current Sim.
    showStats(Sim) - Method in class sims.gameEngine.GameState
    Displays the current statistics of the specified Sim.
    showTime() - Method in class sims.gameEngine.GameState
    Displays the current in-game time.
    Sim - Class in sims.entity
    Represents a Sim character in the Sims world.
    Sim(String, int, int) - Constructor for class sims.entity.Sim
    Constructs a new Sim with the specified name, UUID, and age.
    SimFactory - Class in sims.gameEngine
    A utility factory class for creating and initializing Sims and their environments.
    SimFactory() - Constructor for class sims.gameEngine.SimFactory
     
    sims.actions - package sims.actions
     
    sims.career - package sims.career
     
    sims.entity - package sims.entity
     
    sims.gameEngine - package sims.gameEngine
     
    sims.needs - package sims.needs
     
    sims.world - package sims.world
     
    SkillManager - Class in sims.actions
    Manages skill progression for a Sim by tracking levels and experience points (XP).
    SkillManager() - Constructor for class sims.actions.SkillManager
    Constructs a new SkillManager with default values.
    startGame() - Method in class sims.gameEngine.GameState
    Initializes the simulation by adding a default Sim and several OutsideLocation instances with associated activities.
